description:
Create a dot-probe attentional bias experiment in PsychoPy Builder to measure reaction times to probes following threat/neutral word pairs. The experiment must include an instructions routine, a trial loop, and a concluding thanks routine. Each trial requires a 500ms fixation cross, a 500ms word pair display (with words positioned at y=0.15 and y=-0.15), and a probe (*) appearing at either the top or bottom location. Responses must be captured via 'up' and 'down' keys corresponding to the probe position.

Generate a counterbalanced conditions CSV file with 64 trials using the following 16 word pairs: cancer/basket, coffin/button, danger/garden, death/chair, disease/fiction, failure/passage, agony/asset, panic/paint, murder/window, injury/insect, crisis/branch, attack/bottle, terror/carpet, victim/corner, threat/bridge, and suffer/simple. Each pair must appear in four configurations: Threat Top/Probe Top (Congruent), Threat Top/Probe Bottom (Incongruent), Threat Bottom/Probe Top (Incongruent), and Threat Bottom/Probe Bottom (Congruent). The conditions file must include columns for threatWord, neutralWord, threatPos, probePos, congruency, and corrAns.

Save the experiment to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/dot_probe_bias.psyexp and the conditions file to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/dot_probe_conditions.csv.
